name: GitHub Issue to Mission Ingest
description: Automatically converts GitHub Issues with 'mission' label into active Kyberion missions.

params.message: 🔍 Scanning GitHub for new mission issues...

params.cmd: for row in $(echo '{{parsed_issues}}' | jq -r '.[] | @base64'); do _jq() { echo ${row} | base64 --decode | jq -r ${1}; }; title=$(_jq '.title'); echo "Starting mission: ${title}"; npx tsx scripts/mission_controller.ts start "${title}" personal; done
